Off Calendar Nov-16-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling -
APPLICATION OF G. SEAN JEZ TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE FOR THE PLAINTIFF RUTH BRISCO IS Off calendar for department 302. Per the representation of the moving party on November 15, 2011, this case is singly assigned to Judge Richard Kramer and thus the motion needs to be heard by Judge Kramer.
